title: A Persian Gulf Gambit: How Trump’s Strait of Hormuz Threat Reopens Old Fears With New Stakes
standfirst: Donald Trump’s threat to blockade the Strait of Hormuz has revived one of the world’s most dangerous strategic pressure points, turning a long-running regional rivalry into a test of wills with global economic consequences. The immediate question is not whether the threat is dramatic, but whether it can alter Iran’s calculations before markets, allies and military planners are forced to pay the price.
